images.caption: Figure 1:Overview ofFineRouter.Top: Offline task type discovery via graph-based clustering, producing fine-grained tasks with candidate LLMs per task.Bottom: Online inference where the task classifier assigns prompts to discovered tasks, enabling task-specific adapter activation in the MoE router. Final model selection aggregates task-level scores (Stage 1) with prompt-specific quality predictions (Stage 2).
Figure 2:(a) Routing distribution of FineRouter across 11 candidate models. (b) Cost-performance comparison. FineRouter (curve) outperforms baseline routers (triangles) and individual LLMs (circles).
